잠언 8:1.content: Doesn’t wisdom cry out? Doesn’t understanding raise her voice?

잠언 8:2.content: On the top of high places by the way, where the paths meet, she stands.

잠언 8:3.content: Beside the gates, at the entry of the city, at the entry doors, she cries aloud:

잠언 8:4.content: “I call to you men! I send my voice to the sons of mankind.

잠언 8:5.content: You simple, understand prudence! You fools, be of an understanding heart!

잠언 8:6.content: Hear, for I will speak excellent things. The opening of my lips is for right things.

잠언 8:7.content: For my mouth speaks truth. Wickedness is an abomination to my lips.

잠언 8:8.content: All the words of my mouth are in righteousness. There is nothing crooked or perverse in them.

잠언 8:9.content: They are all plain to him who understands, right to those who find knowledge.

잠언 8:10.content: Receive my instruction rather than silver, knowledge rather than choice gold.

잠언 8:11.content: For wisdom is better than rubies. All the things that may be desired can’t be compared to it.

잠언 8:12.content: “I, wisdom, have made prudence my dwelling. Find out knowledge and discretion.

잠언 8:13.content: The fear of Yahweh is to hate evil. I hate pride, arrogance, the evil way, and the perverse mouth.

잠언 8:14.content: Counsel and sound knowledge are mine. I have understanding and power.

잠언 8:15.content: By me kings reign, and princes decree justice.

잠언 8:16.content: By me princes rule, nobles, and all the righteous rulers of the earth.

잠언 8:17.content: I love those who love me. Those who seek me diligently will find me.

잠언 8:18.content: With me are riches, honor, enduring wealth, and prosperity.

잠언 8:19.content: My fruit is better than gold, yes, than fine gold, my yield than choice silver.

잠언 8:20.content: I walk in the way of righteousness, in the middle of the paths of justice,

잠언 8:21.content: that I may give wealth to those who love me. I fill their treasuries.

잠언 8:22.content: “Yahweh possessed me in the beginning of his work, before his deeds of old.

잠언 8:23.content: I was set up from everlasting, from the beginning, before the earth existed.

잠언 8:24.content: When there were no depths, I was born, when there were no springs abounding with water.

잠언 8:25.content: Before the mountains were settled in place, before the hills, I was born;

잠언 8:26.content: while as yet he had not made the earth, nor the fields, nor the beginning of the dust of the world.

잠언 8:27.content: When he established the heavens, I was there. When he set a circle on the surface of the deep,

잠언 8:28.content: when he established the clouds above, when the springs of the deep became strong,

잠언 8:29.content: when he gave to the sea its boundary, that the waters should not violate his commandment, when he marked out the foundations of the earth,

잠언 8:30.content: then I was the craftsman by his side. I was a delight day by day, always rejoicing before him,

잠언 8:31.content: rejoicing in his whole world. My delight was with the sons of men.

잠언 8:32.content: “Now therefore, my sons, listen to me, for blessed are those who keep my ways.

잠언 8:33.content: Hear instruction, and be wise. Don’t refuse it.

잠언 8:34.content: Blessed is the man who hears me, watching daily at my gates, waiting at my door posts.

잠언 8:35.content: For whoever finds me, finds life, and will obtain favor from Yahweh.

잠언 8:36.content: But he who sins against me wrongs his own soul. All those who hate me love death.”
